prompt: Help me plan my next four weeks as founder of Reveal.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Plan the month as you experience it — energy and focus surfaces, not a wall of tasks.

Protect non-negotiable design blocks so join/trust UX doesn’t regress under shipping pressure. Each week: one primary experience goal, plus tasting the product as a new member (empty states, join friction). Weekly OS: one calm review surface that reduces chaos.

If the calendar is only build hours, the experience of Reveal will quietly decay.
